name: LS-8
description: Last Slot 8 - One-look last-slot algorithms for 2x2. Solves the last slot while orienting and permuting the remaining corners in one step.

algorithms.name: LS-8 Case 1
algorithms.notation: Recognize the cases as TCLLs either by visually swapping UBL and DFR corners or using the three pieces on top that are not part of the first layer
